cards.name: 2 of Cups
cards.interpretation: unity, partnership, attraction, connection, close bonds, joining forces, mutual respect

cards.name: 9 of Wands, reversed
cards.interpretation: stubbornness, rigidity, defensiveness, refusing compromise, giving up

cards.name: Ⅱ The High Priestess, reversed
cards.interpretation: repressed intuition, hidden motives, superficiality, confusion, cognitive dissonance
